_raw:
{
  "summary": "The presenter demonstrates how to use the Astria fashion-AI platform to generate images. They show how to use the 'Describe' tool to generate a detailed prompt from an existing image, and then how to modify the prompt by selecting different clothing items (tank top, jeans) from the UI to see how the 'Details' section of the prompt changes. The goal is to illustrate how the AI interprets and describes different garments.",
